import React,{useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import Swal from'sweetalert2';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[loginInput,setLoginInput]=useState({email:'',password:'',error_list:{}});const handleInput=e=>{e.persist();setLoginInput({...loginInput,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const loginSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const data={email:loginInput.email,password:loginInput.password};axios.post('/api/login',data).then(res=>{if(res.data.status===200){// Store token and user data in local storage

if(res.data.role==='admin'){// Check role from response

setLoginInput({...loginInput,error_list:res.data.validation_errors||{}});}}).catch(error=>{// This catches network errors or other issues with the request
